frame_analyses.description: Blue gauze material suspended in blue bowl with circular pattern marked. Two black laparoscopic instruments visible - appears to be scissors and grasper
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Gauze properly suspended and secured, circular cutting pattern clearly visible

frame_analyses.description: Scissors positioned at edge of circular pattern, beginning to make initial entry cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good positioning at marked line, instruments properly oriented

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing along circular pattern in clockwise direction, grasper providing counter-traction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady progression, good tissue handling with counter-traction

frame_analyses.description: Continued cutting around circle, approximately 1/4 of pattern completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining good line adherence, smooth cutting motion

frame_analyses.description: Cutting continues, appears to have completed approximately 1/3 of circular pattern
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument coordination, cutting line appears to follow pattern well

frame_analyses.description: Significant progress on circular cut, approximately 2/3 completed
Nearly completed circular cut, small section remaining to close the circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good precision maintained as approaching completion point

frame_analyses.description: Circular cut appears completed, cut-out portion still held by grasper
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion achieved, circular piece successfully excised

penalties.description: Minor deviations observed at multiple points around the circle, estimated total deviation approximately 3-4mm across 8 measurement points

confidence_rationale: Completion time clearly observed from timestamps. Cutting precision difficult to measure exactly due to camera angle and resolution - deviations estimated conservatively. Gauze remained properly secured throughout.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at each cardinal point due to camera resolution and angle
Whether any small tears occurred outside the cutting line that are not visible from this angle
technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with consistent cutting technique and good instrument coordination. Time within intermediate range (90-180s). Minor precision deviations but overall good adherence to marked pattern.
strengths: Successful task completion without gauze detachment
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise line following to minimize deviations
Consider varying cutting speed in tighter curve sections for better accuracy
